properties.Test Case: Publish a book to Blorg with shift-enter in its title. Look at the page of the uplaoded book. The shift-enter should be rendered as spaces in the book detail.
properties.Steps: Publish a book to Blorg with shift-enter in its title. Look at the page of the uplaoded book. The shift-enter should be rendered as spaces in the book detail.

properties.Test Case: Secure S3 upload: - Uploads are now atomic. If a book is being updated and something causes the process to fail, the book on blorg will remain as it was before the update started." Test this by interrupting (canceling upload or killing Bloom) and ensure the original book remains intact and unchanged.
properties.Steps:
Secure S3 upload: 
- Uploads are now atomic. If a book is being updated and something causes the process to fail, the book on blorg will remain as it was before the update started." Test this by interrupting (canceling upload or killing Bloom) and ensure the original book remains intact and unchanged.

properties.Test Case: We now only upload files that have changed. So audio/video/images which are not altered will not be re-uploaded. Note that .htm files and meta.json files always change and are always uploaded. PDFs are always generated on the fly and always uploaded." Test a couple of different ways: changed audio or video, changed image, deleted pages, etc.
properties.Steps: - We now only upload files that have changed. So audio/video/images which are not altered will not be re-uploaded. Note that .htm files and meta.json files always change and are always uploaded. PDFs are always generated on the fly and always uploaded." Test a couple of different ways: changed audio or video, changed image, deleted pages, etc.

properties.Test Case: Test all aspects of upload and download to ensure all files are correctly transmitted. This should not affect things like features or languages. After uploading a changed book, download it and inspect it. (JT 6.3: not sure what is meant by not affecting things like features or languages. Presumably if these changed in the updated book, they should change on Blorg, too, after re-uploading. "All aspects" is very broad...that's why we have many lines of test activities for upload. I took it to mean each kind of page element...images, video, widgets.)
properties.Steps: - Test all aspects of upload and download to ensure all files are correctly transmitted. This should not affect things like features or languages. After uploading a changed book, download it and inspect it. (JT 6.3: not sure what is meant by not affecting things like features or languages. Presumably if these changed in the updated book, they should change on Blorg, too, after re-uploading. "All aspects" is very broad...that's why we have many lines of test activities for upload. I took it to mean each kind of page element...images, video, widgets.)

properties.Test Case: Upload a book with over 1000 files. Change one thing -- like crop an image or re-record a sentence -- and reupload. For media files, only the changed image or recording should be reuploaded. (JT 6.3: I used the Tangshang dictionary from Very Large Books subfolder in the Materials for Bloom testing folder. It only has 550 files. Sorry.)
properties.Steps: - Upload a book with over 1000 files. Change one thing -- like crop an image or re-record a sentence -- and reupload. For media files, only the changed image or recording should be reuploaded. (JT 6.3: I used the Tangshang dictionary from Very Large Books subfolder in the Materials for Bloom testing folder.
